phrases.intent_en: Ask where to board the bus
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo subir al autobús turístico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh PWEH-do soo-BEER al ow-to-BOOS too-REE-stee-ko?

responses.english: At the marked stop, opposite the office.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH pah-RAH-dah seh-nyah-lee-THAH-dah FREHN-teh AH LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah
responses.french: En la parada señalizada, frente a la oficina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get the audio commentary
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo consigo los auriculares para el audio?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh kon-SEE-goh lohs ow-ree-koo-LAH-res PAH-rah el OW-dyoh?

responses.english: They are given when validating the ticket inside the bus.
responses.phonetic: AHL soo-BEER PEE-dah LOHS ah-oo-ree-koo-LAH-rehs AHL kohn-dooth-TOHR
responses.french: Al subir, pida los auriculares al conductor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the next bus has space
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿queda sitio libre en el próximo autobús?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KEH-dah SEE-teeoh LEE-breh en el PROK-see-moh ow-toh-BOOS?

responses.english: Yes, there is space available now.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist bus departs from
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde sale el bus turístico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh SAH-leh ehl boos too-REES-tee-koh

responses.english: In front of the Basilica del Pilar, at the central stop.
responses.phonetic: FREHN-teh ah lah bah-SEE-lee-kah dehl pee-LAR, ehn ehl MWEH-yeh sehn-TRAL.
responses.french: Frente a la Basílica del Pilar, en el muelle central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the full bus tour takes
phrases.text_local: ¿Cuánto dura el recorrido completo del bus turístico?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAN-toh DOO-rah ehl reh-koh-REE-doh kom-PLEH-toh dehl boos too-REES-tee-koh

responses.english: Approximately one hour and fifteen minutes.
